## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Change to an existing plugin (commands, behavior)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Marketplace / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in sync in both `plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` (if a plugin changed)
- [ ] Root `README.md` plugin table updated (if a plugin was added or its description changed)
- [ ] New plugin registered in the `plugins` array of `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] No em-dashes or en-dashes in prose
- [ ] Tested locally via `/plugin install <name>@cwakim-plugins`
